name: AutoCar API Connector
description: Connects to the AutoCar Software API with explicit tools to manage invoices, customers, work orders, and inventory.
author: AutoCar Software

name: Moroccan Law Search Skill
description: A specialized ISLI-compatible skill for searching through Moroccan legal documents in Arabic. It utilizes fuzzy matching and automated article number extraction to provide precise legal references.
author: MedELMOUHAJIR

name: Moroccan Cassation Court Search
description: Search and retrieve decisions from the Moroccan Court of Cassation (juriscassation.cspj.ma), jurisprudence.ma, and adala.justice.gov.ma.
author: ISLI Developer

name: Maroc Marchés Publics Scanner
description: Search and retrieve open Moroccan public procurement announcements from marchespublics.gov.ma
author: ISLI Community

name: Bank Al-Maghrib Exchange Rates
description: Fetches live Moroccan Dirham (MAD) exchange rates and monetary statistics from the Central Bank of Morocco (BAM). Essential for e-commerce, ERP, and accounting agents.
author: ISLI Community

name: National Open Data Portal Connector — Morocco
description: Read-only connector to data.gov.ma (CKAN). Search datasets, browse organizations/groups, and discover downloadable resources for Moroccan market research.
author: ISLI AI

name: ANAPEC Job Market Scraper
description: Scrapes live job postings from ANAPEC, providing labor market signals (sector, region, contract type) for HR and business-advisory workflows.
author: ISLI AI

name: n8n Orchestrator WAN
description: Full n8n instance management. Create, update, and manage workflows and executions programmatically with strict pre-commit JSON schema validation.
author: medelmouhajir

name: CNDP Compliance Checklist
description: Data protection compliance assistant for Morocco's Law 09-08 and CNDP guidelines.
author: Antigravity

name: Zernio Social Media Posting
description: Comprehensive skill to use and manage zernio.com social media posting, scheduling, profiles, connected accounts, queue configurations, analytics, and inbox comments.
author: Antigravity AI
